updates.note: Lalbazar is planning to establish a dedicated all-women battalion within the Kolkata Police to maintain law and order and handle female crowds during public protests. The Kolkata Police Commissioner has assigned two senior officers to coordinate the plan, which also includes forming a 20-member female RAF squad in each of the ten divisions and training the 'Winners' team in self-defense. To address current staff shortages, the department will initiate recruitment drives for female police personnel.
